model_output_raw_text: {"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Increase early optimization speed under the fixed 256-step budget by using a higher Adam learning rate, a common strong default for CIFAR-10 in short-run training.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"OPTIMIZER = \"adamw\"","old":"OPTIMIZER = \"adam\"","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = False","old":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = True","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Use decoupled weight decay via AdamW while disabling the harmful short-budget cosine decay; this keeps the strong high-LR behavior but improves regularization dynamics.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 0.0","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"With only 256 optimization steps, reducing regularization pressure can improve fit and lower validation loss before overfitting becomes dominant.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 12","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Increase early feature capacity in the compact CNN to improve representational power within the same fixed 256-step budget.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 64","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 48","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Slightly widen the classifier head to better use the stronger convolutional features from the wider backbone while keeping architecture simple.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"CHANNEL_MULT = 3","old":"CHANNEL_MULT = 2","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Increase second-stage channel width (16->48 instead of 16->32) to add representational capacity where it is most useful, while keeping depth and training dynamics unchanged.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"CHANNEL_MULT = 2","old":"CHANNEL_MULT = 3","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Restore the stronger channel scaling and test a slightly lower AdamW step size to improve stability and validation loss in the short fixed-step regime.","secondary_modes":["layout"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 0.0","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Add a small amount of decoupled weight decay to improve generalization while keeping the improved architecture and learning-rate setting unchanged.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 7e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"With the stronger architecture and small weight decay now in place, a slightly lower learning rate may improve late-step stability and reduce validation loss under the fixed 256-step budget.","secondary_modes":["caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.99)","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.999)","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Reduce AdamW second-moment inertia to adapt faster in the short 256-step regime, which can improve convergence and validation loss.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 6e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 7e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Continue local learning-rate tuning downward after recent gains; a slightly smaller step size may further improve final validation loss with this AdamW beta setting.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.99)","function":"","new":"","old":"","op":"insert_after","source":"","text":"\nGRAD_CLIP_NORM = 1.0"},{"anchor":"            loss.backward()","function":"","new":"","old":"","op":"insert_after","source":"","text":"\n            torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_(model.parameters(), GRAD_CLIP_NORM)"}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Add light gradient clipping to stabilize occasional large updates in the short-budget regime, aiming to improve validation loss without changing overall optimization setup.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 7e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 6e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Return to the better-performing learning-rate neighborhood while keeping other recent changes fixed to isolate and recover short-budget optimization quality.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 7.5e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 7e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"With gradient clipping active, test a slightly higher learning rate to increase progress per step while controlling instability.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 7e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 7.5e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Return to the previously best-performing learning rate after the upward perturbation degraded validation loss.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"GRAD_CLIP_NORM = 0.5","old":"GRAD_CLIP_NORM = 1.0","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Test slightly stronger gradient clipping to further reduce occasional unstable updates while preserving the current high-performing optimizer and LR settings.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Test a modest increase in AdamW weight decay to improve generalization now that optimization is stable with tuned LR, betas, and clipping.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.85, 0.99)","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.99)","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Slightly lower beta1 to increase adaptivity of AdamW momentum in the short fixed-step budget, potentially improving late validation loss.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.99)","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.85, 0.99)","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Revert beta1 to the previously best-performing setting after the beta1 reduction caused a clear loss regression.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}
